info.name: ChefLogik API
info.description:
Full API collection for ChefLogik — Restaurant Management SaaS.

**Setup:**
1. Set the `base_url` variable to `http://localhost:8000`
2. Run **Staff Auth → Login** and copy the token into `staff_token`
3. Set `tenant_id` to your tenant UUID
4. Run platform requests with `platform_token` from **Platform Auth → Login**

**Auth guards:**
- `staff_token` — used by all `/api/v1/` endpoints (except public menu)
- `platform_token` — used by all `/api/platform/` endpoints
- `customer_token` — used by customer auth endpoints

request.description: Public endpoint — no auth required. Returns all active plans with feature flags. Used on the signup page.
Public — no auth. Live validation for the signup form. Returns available: true/false.
Public — no auth. Creates tenant + 8 system roles + owner. Returns Sanctum token (owner is immediately logged in). Next step: POST /api/v1/onboarding/branch.
Returns current wizard step (branch_setup or complete), has_branch, and first_branch_id once set.
Creates first branch and marks onboarding as complete. Returns 422 if a branch already exists (use branch management API for additional branches).
Marks onboarding as complete without requiring branch setup. Use when owner skips the wizard.

item.name: Create Tenant (+ auto-provisions owner & 8 system roles)

request.description: Usage statistics for a tenant: branch count, active staff, customers, last 30-day orders/revenue, upcoming reservations and events.
Creates a 1-hour Sanctum token for the tenant's owner. Re-calling revokes the previous impersonation token. Writes audit log. Returns token, expires_at, user info.
Suspend an active tenant. Returns 422 if already suspended or cancelled. Writes audit log with reason.
Reactivate a suspended tenant. Returns 422 if not suspended. Writes audit log.
Returns the authenticated staff member's own profile including name, email, phone, photo_url, and personal settings (theme, notifications).
Update own profile. All fields optional. theme: ocean | forest | orange.
Upload own profile photo to S3. Accepts: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp. Max 2 MB. Returns updated profile with new photo_url.
Change own password. Requires current_password for verification. password must be min 8 chars and must match password_confirmation.
Manager updates another staff member's profile. Requires staff.manage permission. Same fields as PATCH /profile.

item.name: Upload Photo for Another Staff Member (Manager)

request.description: Manager uploads a profile photo for another staff member. Requires staff.manage permission. Accepts: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp. Max 2 MB.
List all roles currently assigned to a staff member. Requires roles.view permission.

Assign a role to a staff member. branch_ids=null means all branches. Privilege escalation check: actor cannot assign permissions they don't hold. Idempotent — duplicate assignments are updated rather than duplicated. Requires roles.assign permission.
Revoke a role from a staff member. Returns 422 if the role is not assigned or if it is the staff member's last role. Requires roles.assign permission.
Bulk-publish all draft shifts for a branch within a date range. Returns { data: { published_count: N } }. Requires shifts.manage permission.

body.raw:
{
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "sku": "BURGER-01",
  "name": "Classic Burger",
  "description": "8oz beef patty, lettuce, tomato, pickles",
  "base_price": 12.50,
  "is_active": true,
  "is_master": true,
  "allergens": ["gluten", "dairy"],
  "dietary_flags": []
}

request.description: No authentication required. Returns active menu items with branch price overrides applied.

**Valid sources:** dine_in_pos | takeaway_counter | qr_self_order | delivery_uber_eats | delivery_doordash | delivery_direct | phone

Total = subtotal + delivery_fee + service_charge − discount_amount

**Valid transitions:**
- new → confirmed | cancelled
- confirmed → preparing | cancelled
- preparing → ready | cancelled
- ready → served | cancelled
- served → bill_settled
- bill_settled → completed | cancelled

Invalid transitions return 422.
**Valid reason_codes:** customer_request | out_of_stock | kitchen_error | payment_failed | delivery_failure | restaurant_closed | other

header.description: Required — unique UUID per payment attempt

request.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for the order total. Returns client_secret for use with Stripe.js. Requires Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate charges on retry. Blocked by platform.stripe_enabled setting.
Initiates a refund via the centralised RefundEngine. Omit amount_cents for a full refund. Requires orders.refund permission.

item.name: Owners
item.description: Create additional business owners for the authenticated tenant. Requires `owners.manage` permission (owner role only — branch managers are excluded).

request.description: Creates a new business owner for the authenticated tenant. The new owner receives a welcome email with a temporary password. Email must be unique within this tenant (two different tenants may share the same email). Requires `owners.manage` permission.
Returns available time slots and tables for the given branch, date, and party size. Uses operating hours (special hours take precedence).
List reservations. Filter by branch_id, date, status.
Create a reservation. If table_id is provided the table is immediately marked reserved. Reminder jobs are scheduled (SMS stub until Decision 8 confirmed).
confirmed → arrived
confirmed/arrived → seated. Also transitions table free/reserved → occupied.
seated → completed. Table transitions to needs_cleaning.
confirmed → no_show. Frees the table and increments customer no_show_count.
Returns floor plan with its tables.
New tables are always created with status=free.
Valid transitions: free→reserved/occupied/blocked, reserved→occupied/free/blocked, occupied→needs_cleaning/free, needs_cleaning→free, blocked→free. Returns 409 on invalid transition.
Requires reservations.block_tables permission.
Requires reservations.block_tables permission.
Returns only waiting entries, ordered by joined_at.
Seats the party at the given table. Transitions table to occupied.
Marks the party as left (they didn't wait).
Returns action=match (single profile found), action=create (no match, create new), or action=multiple (host must pick). Phone is normalised to E.164.

item.name: Customer Auth
item.description: Customer portal authentication. Platform-level accounts — one login across all restaurants. After login, call /auth/select to get a tenant-scoped token.

item.name: Customer Portal
item.description: Customer-facing portal endpoints. Requires a tenant-scoped customer token (from /auth/select).

request.description: View own loyalty data (tier, points, visit history) for the selected restaurant.
Initiates GDPR erasure. Sets status=deletion_pending, stops all marketing. Anonymisation happens after 14-day window.

query.description: Set to 1 to show only future reservations

request.description: List own reservation history for the selected restaurant. Newest first. Requires tenant-scoped customer token.
View a single reservation. Returns 404 if the reservation belongs to another customer.

query.description: Set to 1 to show only upcoming non-cancelled/completed bookings

request.description: List own event booking history for the selected restaurant. Newest first.
View a single event booking with space, package, run sheet, and organiser contact details. Returns 404 if the event belongs to another customer.

item.name: Customers (Staff-facing)
item.description: Staff-facing customer management. Requires staff token and tenant context. Routes use CustomerTenantProfile IDs (per-tenant).

request.description: Finds or creates platform-level CustomerProfile, then creates CustomerTenantProfile for this restaurant. Returns 409 if duplicate platform profiles exist (merge required).
Positive delta awards points. Negative delta deducts (balance cannot go below 0). Requires customers.adjust_points permission.
Requires customers.gdpr permission. Sets status=deletion_pending and stops all comms immediately.
Returns aggregate visit counts, last visit date, and total spend per branch for this customer. Requires customers.view_full permission.

body.raw:
{
  "branch_id": "{{branch_id}}",
  "name": "The Cellar Room",
  "capacity_min": 10,
  "capacity_max": 60,
  "default_minimum_spend": 500.00,
  "hire_fee": 150.00,
  "description": "A private dining space in the basement.",
  "amenities": ["projector", "private bar", "AV system"]
}

request.description: Checks if new_event_value + outstanding balance exceeds credit_limit. Returns within_limit=false and requires_owner_auth=true if limit would be exceeded.
Optional filters: status (enquiry|proposal|confirmed|pre_event|day_of|completed|cancelled), branch_id, event_date
Confirms booking and auto-generates pre-event tasks based on occasion_type. Deposit collection requires Stripe (Decision 7 pending).
reason: price | date_unavailable | competitor | no_response | other
Transitions pre_event → day_of and builds the run sheet JSONB from current event state.
⚠️ Stripe (Decision 7) pending. Returns a stub client_secret. Will create a real PaymentIntent once Stripe is confirmed.

header.description: Required — unique UUID per payment attempt

request.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for the event deposit. Only valid on proposal or confirmed events. Returns client_secret for Stripe.js. Requires events.manage permission.
status: pending | in_progress | completed | skipped
Positive delta adds stock, negative delta deducts. Records a StockMovement of type 'adjustment'.
Requires inventory.manage_recipes permission.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Premier Foods Ltd",
  "contact_name": "Sarah Johnson",
  "email": "orders@premierfoods.co.uk",
  "phone": "+44 20 7946 0000",
  "address": "10 Food Way, London, E1 2AB"
}

request.description: Transitions PO from draft → sent. Returns 422 if already sent.
Marks GRN as completed. Recalculates WAC for each line item and propagates cost_price to linked menu items. Returns 422 if GRN is already completed.
Deducts stock and records cost_at_wac snapshot. waste_type: spoilage | prep | service | overproduction | unaccounted | staff_meal
Snapshots current system_quantity for all items in the branch into stocktake_counts. Returns 409 if an in_progress stocktake exists for the branch.
Locks the stocktake. If apply_corrections=true, adjusts stock levels to match counted quantities via StocktakeCorrection movements.
Optional ?station= filter: grill | fryer | cold | pass. Returns pending and in_progress tickets.
Sets item status to preparing and ticket status to in_progress.
Must be called before markItemPrepared if the item has has_allergen_alert=true. Immutable — returns 422 if called twice.
Hard gate: returns 422 if allergen_acknowledged_at is null and has_allergen_alert=true. When all items prepared, ticket auto-bumps to 'ready'.
Marks ticket as completed and sets bumped_at timestamp.

query.description: Optional — include to get branch-level cascade

request.description: Returns all settings resolved via cascade: branch → tenant → platform → config default. Pass ?branch_id= to include branch overrides. Requires settings.view.
Returns full settings catalogue grouped by module. Each key includes: label, type, scopes, options, min, max, current value, can_edit flag (based on actor's permissions). Requires settings.view.
Returns tenant-level setting overrides only (no cascade). Keys with no override return their config default. Requires settings.view.

body.raw:
{
  "settings": {
    "loyalty.earn_rate": 1.5,
    "loyalty.min_redeem_points": 200,
    "reservations.default_duration": 90,
    "reservations.slot_interval": 30,
    "reservations.max_party_size": 20,
    "reservations.advance_booking_days": 90,
    "orders.service_charge_pct": 10.0,
    "orders.auto_accept_online": false,
    "kds.warning_threshold_minutes": 5,
    "kds.critical_threshold_minutes": 10,
    "notifications.reservation_reminder_24h": true,
    "notifications.reservation_reminder_2h": true,
    "notifications.order_confirmation_sms": false,
    "notifications.order_confirmation_email": true,
    "notifications.low_stock_alerts": true,
    "notifications.low_stock_email": false,
    "staff.attendance_grace_period_minutes": 5,
    "ui.date_format": "DD/MM/YYYY",
    "ui.time_format": "24h",
    "ui.items_per_page": 25
  }
}

request.description: Update one or more tenant-level settings. Each key is validated against type, min, max, and allowed options. Actor must have the permission required by each key (checked per key — partial updates allowed). Returns 403 per-key if permission missing.
Returns branch-level setting overrides only (no cascade). Only branch-scoped keys are returned. Keys with no override return their config default. Requires settings.view.
Update one or more branch-level settings. Only branch-scoped keys are accepted. Actor must hold the permission required by each key.
List all setting delegations for this tenant — which setting keys have been delegated to which role slugs, and by whom. Requires settings.delegate permission.
Delegate a setting key to a role slug. The grantor must hold settings.delegate AND be able to edit the key themselves. Idempotent — calling again with the same key+role is a no-op.
Revoke a previously granted delegation. Requires settings.delegate. Replace 'loyalty.earn_rate' and 'branch_manager' in the URL with the actual key and role slug.
Cross-branch revenue summary, customer segments, top customers, churn risk list. Requires analytics.owner_dashboard permission.
Single-branch revenue trend, top dishes by units sold, menu engineering quadrant breakdown.
Live KDS metrics for today: ticket stats by status, active pending/in-progress tickets, unacknowledged allergen count, hourly revenue snapshots.
Event revenue by status, lead conversion rate, lost-reason breakdown, upcoming confirmed events.
RFM segment distribution, churn risk count, top high-value-at-risk customers, total projected CLV across all customers.
List all subscription plans ordered by price. Used by admin UI when switching a tenant's plan.

header.description: Stripe-generated HMAC signature — verified against STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET

request.description: Stripe webhook endpoint. No auth required — verified via Stripe-Signature header. Dispatches to critical queue and returns 200 within 5 seconds. Handled events: payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.payment_failed, charge.refunded.
Returns all platform-scope settings with current values, labels, types, defaults, and allowed options. Requires platform admin auth.
Update one or more platform-scope settings. Only platform-scope keys accepted. Requires platform admin auth. Options — default_plan: starter | growth | enterprise.
